mnemonics.title: Recursion
mnemonics.content: R.E.C.U.R.S.I.O.N. - Repeat, Evaluate, Call, Until, Return, Solve, Iterate, Optimize, Navigate

acronyms.usage: To remember the key components of a recursive function

visualTips.visualization: Imagine a set of Russian dolls, where each doll represents a recursive call

analogies.analogy: A recursive function is like a mirror reflecting a mirror, where each reflection represents a recursive call
